inventory.name: Candle
inventory.description: Flickers in still air.

inventory.name: Codex of the First Age
inventory.description: A heavy book bound in something that is not leather. The text inside appears to be nonsense — letters in the right script but in the wrong order. Something about it resists being read directly.

inventory.name: Ashen Tablet
inventory.description: Flat pale stone, dense Eldrosian script. One passage is legible.

inventory.name: Imperial Edict
inventory.description: A formal declaration on pressed material, embossed with the Eldrosian serpent-sun emblem.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Strong Tonic
inventory.description: A thick, bitter draught. Restores 25 HP.

inventory.name: Warden's Key
inventory.description: A long iron key stamped with the Warden's eye-and-scales emblem. Official issue.

inventory.name: Antidote
inventory.description: Cures poison.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Ember Flask
inventory.description: Captured flame. Burns going down. Restores 20 HP.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Codex of the First Age
inventory.description: A heavy book bound in something that is not leather.

inventory.name: Voidhardened Vest
inventory.description: Treated with something from deep below. Resists drain.

inventory.name: Vein-Sealer
inventory.description: Restores 50 HP. Hardens wounds against reopening.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Fragment of the Seal
inventory.description: A shard of the Shattered Crown's sealing mechanism. It vibrates faintly when near a Godshard. Imperial goldsmiths made these — their names are on the back in tiny script.

inventory.name: Shard-Seeker's Map
inventory.description: A rough map of the upper ruins, annotated in a mercenary's hand. Three locations are circled and labelled: SHARD? SHARD? SHARD?. All three circles are crossed out.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Bloodmoss Tincture
inventory.description: Restores 10 HP.

inventory.name: Third Godshard
inventory.description: A third fragment. Holding it alongside the others, you feel something beginning to cohere — something that was once whole recognising what it was.

inventory.name: Crystal Mirror
inventory.description: Shows something not quite you. The reflection moves a fraction late.

inventory.name: Cultist's Sigil
inventory.description: A disc of dark metal stamped with a symbol: a circle with a crack through it. It is warm. It should not be warm.

inventory.name: Void Salt
inventory.description: Wards vs drain for one fight.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Talarion's Chronicle
inventory.description: A thick, handwritten volume. The author gives his name on the first page: Talarion. The last line reads: 'And so I tell it, because someone must.'

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Antidote
inventory.description: Cures poison.

inventory.name: Ashen Tablet
inventory.description: Flat pale stone, dense Eldrosian script. One passage is legible.

inventory.name: Imperial Edict
inventory.description: A formal declaration on pressed material, embossed with the Eldrosian serpent-sun emblem.

inventory.name: Health Potion
inventory.description: Restores 15 HP.

inventory.name: Needle of Vaethar
inventory.description: A thin blade. Something inside it hums when near the Void-well.

inventory.name: Bloodmoss Tincture
inventory.description: Dark paste on wounds. Restores 10 HP.

inventory.name: Second Godshard
inventory.description: A second fragment of Vaethar's divided form. It resonates with the first. Together they produce a frequency that is almost a chord.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Ember Flask
inventory.description: Captured flame. Burns going down. Restores 20 HP.

inventory.name: Scale Armour
inventory.description: Worked from something's hide. Darker than iron, warmer than stone.

inventory.name: Health Potion
inventory.description: Restores 15 HP.

inventory.name: Bloodmoss Tincture
inventory.description: Dark paste on wounds. Restores 10 HP.

inventory.name: Void Shard
inventory.description: A sliver of absolute dark. Cold beyond cold. It should not exist.

inventory.name: Antidote
inventory.description: Cures poison.

inventory.name: Relic Coin
inventory.description: Engraved with an erased face. Inscription: ELDROS PRIMA.
